PRO TEMP THORN SMITH, L.NAJERA/CSR, K.LEE/CLERK 02:50PM CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALLYCE KIMERLING FOR THE PLTF AND HAZEL WILSON PRESENT IN PRO PER. ENELE WILSON THE SECOND DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. CASE IS SETTLED AS TO HAZEL WILSON ONLY. TERMS ON THE RECORD.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILSON, HAZEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 575 BAY STREET #176 IN S.F., STAYED UNTIL DEC-11-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, AT 12:00 NOON, THIS STIPULATED JUDGMENT DOES NOT INCLUDE THE OTHER DEFENDANT ENELE WILSON.
